name: Carbendazim
description: Carbendazim has been used in trials studying the treatment of Lymphoma and Unspecified Adult Solid Tumor, Protocol Specific.

interactions.name: Chloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Carbendazim can be decreased when it is combined with Chloroquine.

interactions.name: Amodiaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Carbendazim can be decreased when it is combined with Amodiaquine.

interactions.name: Primaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Carbendazim can be decreased when it is combined with Primaquine.

interactions.name: Hydroxychloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Carbendazim can be decreased when it is combined with Hydroxychloroquine.
